title: Halal Snapper Flame
description: A peppery and velvety halal-friendly snapper dish perfect for a post-workout meal in the style of Slovakian cuisine.
instructions: Mix all-purpose flour, cumin powder, paprika powder, and a pinch of red chili flakes in a shallow bowl.
Gently coat the snapper fillets with the spice mixture on both sides.
Place the coated fish fillets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush each fillet lightly with water to create steam during cooking.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and has a golden-brown crust. Adjust seasoning if needed.
Let it rest for about 5 minutes before serving.
